title: Specify adapter manifest
description: Shared shape for source and target adapter manifests (`adapter.yaml`) per workflow §Adapter implementation shape. Carries the kebab-case `name`, integer `version`, the `axis` discriminator (`source` or `target`), the `briefs.<operation>` map of relative brief paths, and an optional `tools[]` declaration. The set of operations is closed by the per-axis `briefs` constraints in `source.schema.json` and `target.schema.json` — `briefs.keys()` is the canonical operation iterator.

name.description: Adapter identifier in kebab-case. Must match the directory name under sources/ or targets/.

version.description: Major adapter version. Increments when the adapter ships breaking operation or contract changes.

axis.description: Adapter role. `source` adapters survey leads and extract evidence; `target` adapters supply `shape`, `build`, and `merge` briefs.

briefs.description: Map from operation name to a relative path to the brief markdown file. Absolute paths and URIs are rejected. The per-axis schemas (`source.schema.json`, `target.schema.json`) close the legal key set.

tools.description: Optional WASI tool declarations for declared WASI tools. Tools resolve into the out-of-tree per-project cache under `manifests/{sources,targets}/<name>/`.

inputs.description: Optional adapter-declared build inputs. Target-only: the per-axis `target.schema.json` admits the key while `source.schema.json` rejects it; the shared shape carries the property so the closed key set admits it. Each entry is a path relative to the build request's `inputs.root`, flagged `required`.

description.description: Human-readable, single-sentence summary of the adapter's role. Required.

platforms.description: Optional declarative platforms capability. Target-only: the per-axis `target.schema.json` refines the shape with `$defs/platformsCapability`; `source.schema.json` rejects the key. The shared shape carries the property so the closed key set (from `additionalProperties: false`) admits it.

execution.description: Closed adapter execution mode (`agent` | `tool`). `required` is owned by the per-axis `source.schema.json` / `target.schema.json`; the shared shape carries the property so the closed key set admits it.

kebabName.description: Kebab-case identifier: lowercase letters and digits grouped by single internal hyphens; no leading, trailing, or consecutive hyphens.

path.description: Build input path relative to the build request's `inputs.root` (the slice tree). Absolute paths and URIs are rejected.

required.description: Whether `build` requires this input; a missing `required` path is a build-time abort.

name.description: WASI tool identifier; resolves under the out-of-tree per-project cache at `manifests/{sources,targets}/<adapter>/<name>/`.

version.description: Required semver pin (`x.y.z` with optional `-prerelease`). Tools without a release must cut one before being declared, so every dispatched tool carries an auditable version.
